title: Implement the pest monitoring and evaluation plan
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Implement the pest monitoring and evaluation plan demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Obtain and collate all available data

pcs.text: Determine objectives of pest monitoring and evaluation plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine objectives of pest monitoring and evaluation plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine objectives of pest monitoring and evaluation plan.

pcs.text: Collate data on pest numbers, economic and environmental impacts of pests and pest management plan operating costs

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collate data on pest numbers, economic and environmental impacts of pests and pest management plan operating costs.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Consult with stakeholders for input into pest management plan.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Investigate and record previous pest control activity.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Verify and record compliance with health and safety and environmental requirements.
